title: Crypto ETFs: Blockchain Equities Reemerge
description: Crypto equity ETFs (or blockchain ETFs) were once one of the main ways to access the crypto theme in an ETF wrapper. That changed after the January 2024 approval of spot bitcoin ETPs, which gave investors a simpler and more direct way to express a bitcoin view. title: Digital Finance Forum Highlights Industry Growth
description: [Written by Patrice Horner] The first day of the Digital Finance Forum [DFF] in Bermuda revealed a host of successes, including Bitcoin Suisse receiving its Asset Management License from the BMA.
